findings.observation: Breadcrumb displays raw UUID (c48549a4-ff99-4210-997f-...) instead of workflow name. Exposes internal implementation details.
findings.suggestion: Resolve workflow name from loaded record and display in breadcrumb. Set document.title to include workflow name.

findings.observation: Workflow named 'Untitled Workflow' with no description, 0 runs, 'Never' last run visible in demo data. Communicates incomplete work.
findings.suggestion: Replace with meaningful name like 'Windows Server Monthly Rollup'. Add backend validation preventing save of unnamed workflows.

findings.observation: More actions dropdown now renders but functional wiring needs verification. If Delete/Archive clicks produce no result, demo is disqualified.
findings.suggestion: Verify Delete triggers confirmation dialog and executes. Wire Archive to transition workflow status. Add confirmation dialog for destructive actions.
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — Active and Pressed States; consistency.md — Action Patterns

findings.observation: All execution records show identical 'paused' status regardless of actual outcome. Last Run column shows failure icons for some, dash for others, nothing for rest. Data inconsistency means users cannot trust execution status anywhere.
findings.suggestion: Fix execution status mapping so completed/failed/running/cancelled render with correct labels. Ensure status written back to workflow record matches actual outcome. Seed data should include mix of success and failure.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Status Indicators; enterprise.md — Data Credibility

findings.element: Duplicate stat cards + tab filter controls
findings.observation: Both stat cards and tab pills filter the table on click. Two parallel filtering controls for the same dimension create cognitive overload.
findings.suggestion: Make stat cards display-only (remove click handler) OR remove tab pills. One filter surface is sufficient.

findings.element: Node config panel in editor — missing labels/help
findings.observation: Deploy All config shows bare fields (Percentage, Max Parallel, Timeout Minutes, Success Threshold) with no descriptions, units, or validation hints.
findings.suggestion: Add descriptive labels, units (e.g. 'Timeout (minutes)'), info tooltips, and input validation with visible constraints.

findings.observation: Config panel shows 'Select a node to view its configuration' placeholder when no node selected. Ambiguous whether panel is display-only or editable.
findings.suggestion: Auto-select first node when preview opens. Label panel 'Node Details' with 'Edit in full editor' CTA.

findings.element: Stat cards reflect filtered counts, not totals
findings.observation: Searching 'nonexistent' shows all stat cards at 0 TOTAL. Stat cards should always show global totals regardless of filter.
findings.suggestion: Decouple stat card values from search/filter state. Show 'X of Y total' or keep cards at unfiltered totals.

findings.element: Last Run column — inconsistent status representation
findings.observation: Three different display patterns in one column: dash + time, X icon + time, time alone. No text labels for status.
findings.suggestion: Standardize: 'Never' for no executions. '[Status badge] [relative time]' consistently for all rows with executions. Use Badge component with text.
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — Data Formatting; data-integrity.md — Status Indicators

findings.element: Auto-layout produces vertical stack instead of horizontal DAG
findings.observation: Auto-layout arranges nodes in vertical column; existing workflows display horizontally. Inconsistent and misleading for DAGs with parallel paths.
findings.suggestion: Default auto-layout to horizontal (left-to-right) via elkjs. Offer layout direction toggle.

findings.observation: Pagination shows only Previous/Next buttons. No 'Showing 1-6 of 6 workflows' indicator.
findings.suggestion: Add 'Showing {start}-{end} of {total} workflows' text to pagination footer.
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — Counts and Totals; enterprise.md — Scale Behavior

findings.element: Console form field missing id/name attribute
findings.observation: Console reports 'A form field element should have an id or name attribute'. Affects autofill, label association, and testing tools.
findings.suggestion: Add id='workflow-name' and name='workflow-name' to the input element.

findings.element: No unsaved changes warning in editor
findings.observation: Navigating away from editor with changes discards them silently. Silent data loss risk.
findings.suggestion: Add beforeunload handler and router-level navigation guard with Cancel/Discard options.

findings.observation: Palette items show no visual cue they are draggable. No grab cursor, no drag handle icon, no tooltip.
findings.suggestion: Add cursor:grab, grip/drag-handle icon, tooltip 'Drag to canvas to add'. Fix scrollbar dark theme styling.

findings.element: No export capability for workflow list
findings.observation: No CSV/XLSX export option. Enterprise procurement teams and compliance auditors need automation inventory exports.
findings.suggestion: Add export button (CSV minimum) in page header. Include name, status, node count, run count, last run date/status.

findings.observation: Duplicate buttons exist but no evidence clicking produces any result. No loading spinner, success toast, or error handling.
findings.suggestion: Wire to clone-workflow API. Show loading spinner on click, success toast on completion, error toast on failure.

findings.element: Draft stat card shows '0 PUBLISHED' in green
findings.observation: Zero count rendered in success/brand color sends contradictory signal. Green means 'good' but 0 published is not good.
findings.suggestion: Render stat card values in neutral color when count is zero. Only apply brand color to non-zero values.
findings.standard_violated: visual.md — Color; data-integrity.md — Zero vs Null

findings.observation: Template names only, no descriptions of contents or when to use each.
findings.suggestion: Add 1-line description under each template name with expected node count.

findings.observation: Page renders identically to desktop at 768px. Sidebar still full-width, table columns cramped.
findings.suggestion: Collapse sidebar to icon-only below 1024px. Hide less critical table columns behind 'more' affordance.

findings.element: New workflow canvas — no onboarding guidance
findings.observation: Blank canvas with single Trigger node, no instructional overlay or tooltips for first-time users.
findings.suggestion: Add first-use overlay: 'Drag nodes from the palette to build your workflow'. Dismiss on first drag.

findings.element: Palette scrollbar — white on dark theme
findings.observation: Raw browser-default white scrollbar clashes with dark theme in node palette.
findings.suggestion: Apply custom scrollbar styling via scrollbar-color CSS or Tailwind scrollbar utilities.

findings.element: Archived tab empty state icon generic
findings.observation: Empty state uses generic icon with 'No workflows match your filters'. Could be more contextual.
findings.suggestion: Use Archive icon. Change copy to 'No archived workflows' with 'Workflows you archive will appear here.'

findings.observation: Hover state on buttons appears identical to default state in dark theme.
findings.suggestion: Increase hover contrast — lighter background shade, or subtle scale transition.

findings.observation: Page title generic 'PatchIQ — Patch Manager'. No meta description.
findings.suggestion: Set document.title to 'Workflows — PatchIQ'. Add meta description for link previews.

findings.observation: Expanded row shows 'Open Editor' button; row action shows 'Edit' icon. Same destination, different labels.
findings.suggestion: Standardize to 'Edit' everywhere.
